summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for AIIF CSR Conclave 2026 landing page with 7 new updates. Most features working correctly with one minor issue found.

integration_issues.issue: X (Twitter) share option missing from share menu
integration_issues.details: Share menu shows WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Facebook, Email but missing X (Twitter) option

passed_tests: New logo URL (v3dquimv) correctly displayed in hero, navbar, and footer
New poster URL (ilep1hsy) correctly displayed in hero section
Vision section shows '250+ Attendees Expected' as required
QR Payment section renders with all 3 QR codes (2999, 2499, 499)
UPI ID copy button (ajk01@fbl) functions correctly
Registration button links to correct Google Form (https://forms.gle/fLC7vH53Tw47WfVR6)
Floating share button opens menu with 4/5 expected options (missing X Twitter)
Pricing cards show correct amounts (2,999, 2,499, 499) with proper formatting
Navigation links scroll to sections correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Add missing X (Twitter) share option to FloatingShare component. Currently only WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Facebook, Email are present but X (Twitter) is missing from the share menu.
